title: How Chasing God Before a Wife Builds the Man Worth Marrying
caption:
Every hour spent performing for a woman who isn't yours yet is an hour stolen from the God who's actually building you.

Chasing a wife before you've chased God produces a desperate man. She can read it from across the room. Chase Him first and the desperation dies quietly, in private, where it belongs.

The workouts, the job, the character. Build them because God's forming you, not because someone might be watching.

Pray for her by name. Then close the app and get back to becoming the man she'll actually need.

Save this for the season you're tempted to chase her instead of Him.

#faith #christianmen #godlymen #manofgod #relationships #scripture #discipline #brotherhood
theme: He chases God, not a wife.
